overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a covered urban tunnel with a pedestrian walkway on the left and a multi-lane road with futuristic vehicles on the right. The tunnel features industrial concrete architecture with yellow neon accent lighting and fluorescent ceiling lights, progressing toward a bright exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban tunnel with pedestrian walkway and vehicle lanes

events.description: passing large circular ventilation pipe on left wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the tunnel along the pedestrian walkway

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving past on the right side road

entered.detail: dark grey concrete wall with vertical panels running along the left side
horizontal yellow accent lighting strips mounted high on the left wall
long white fluorescent light fixtures running along the tunnel ceiling
large industrial circular ventilation pipe protruding from the left wall
dark asphalt road surface with yellow dividing line on the right side
bright white light visible at the far end of the tunnel indicating the exit

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a covered concrete tunnel. The left side features a pedestrian walkway beside a dark concrete wall with yellow neon accent strips and large circular ventilation pipes. On the right, a multi-lane asphalt road has sparse futuristic vehicle traffic passing by. The tunnel is illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights with a bright exit glow visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban tunnel with pedestrian walkway and vehicle lanes

events.description: exit light ahead becomes noticeably brighter as distance decreases

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through the tunnel, approaching the exit light

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the right side road

entered.detail: another large circular ventilation pipe appearing on the left wall

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the tunnel, the camera passes the first ventilation pipe and approaches a second one. The bright exit light ahead grows larger and more intense. Futuristic vehicles continue to pass by on the right while the concrete walls and neon lighting remain consistent.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel approach to exit with increasing natural light

events.description: approaching tunnel exit with bright daylight becoming dominant light source

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bright tunnel exit, nearing the end of the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving past close to the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the tunnel exit. The bright daylight at the end of the tunnel dominates the view, creating a high-contrast scene with the artificial lighting. The second ventilation pipe is passed, and the exit light fills the center of the frame as the camera nears the end of the covered urban tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a dim, industrial concrete tunnel that gradually transitions into a blindingly bright urban exit. It begins beside a pedestrian walkway lined with yellow neon accent strips and large circular ventilation pipes, while futuristic vehicles glide along a multi-lane asphalt road to the right. As the camera moves forward, it passes a second ventilation pipe while the distant glow of the exit grows larger and more intense. The scene then shifts into a high-contrast environment where the artificial fluorescent lighting is overwhelmed by the encroaching daylight. Finally, the bright light fills the center of the frame as the camera reaches the end of the covered tunnel.
